# Nosh Tours

> Nosh Tours is a luxury travel curation company offering unscripted, all-inclusive private journeys across Asia and Europe. Founded by Aditya TG and Akshay Manoj. Fixed pricing model with no hidden charges. Built by a team of 50+ Nosh Brains executing custom itineraries from guest-chosen building blocks. Backed by a 7,000+ member travel entrepreneur community.

Nosh Tours LLP grew from ₹50,000 in seed capital to ₹5 crore in turnover over three years. The company is featured in The CEO Magazine India and Ahmedabad Mirror.

## Brand Promise

- **Unscripted travel** — itineraries built from the guest's chosen building blocks, not pre-packaged tours
- **All-inclusive fixed pricing** — flights, stays, transfers, activities, meals included where stated
- **No hidden charges** — what you see at booking is what you pay
- **50+ Nosh Brains** — in-house specialists handling each touchpoint of every tour
- **Asian + European destinations** — covering both established and emerging luxury circuits

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://noshtours.com/): Brand story, building blocks model, founder note, press features, FAQ
- [Destinations](https://noshtours.com/destinations): All seven destination canvases — Kerala, Kashmir, Maldives, Thailand, Vietnam, Uzbekistan, and Europe
- [Experience Builder](https://noshtours.com/experience): Interactive guide for assembling a custom itinerary from building blocks
- [About](https://noshtours.com/about): Founder story, company milestones, the 50+ Nosh Brains team, community
- [Journal](https://noshtours.com/blog): Travel notes, destination guides, philosophy pieces

## Featured Articles

- [What is Unscripted Travel?](https://noshtours.com/blog/what-is-unscripted-travel-india): The Nosh Tours philosophy explained — how building blocks replace fixed packages
- [Gift a Luxury Trip in 2026](https://noshtours.com/blog/gift-luxury-trip-india-2026): A guide to gifting curated travel experiences

## Contact

- WhatsApp: +91 95676 32255
- Email: hello@noshtours.com
- Website: https://noshtours.com
- Instagram: @noshtours

## Audience Position

Nosh Tours serves discerning Indian and international travellers (en-IN, en-US, en-GB) seeking refined, private journeys. Not a budget operator. Not a fixed-departure mass tour company. The product is closer to a high-touch travel atelier than to a typical agency.

## Trust Indicators

- ₹5 crore turnover, bootstrapped from ₹50,000
- 7,000+ member travel entrepreneur community
- 50+ in-house team members
- Press features: The CEO Magazine India, Ahmedabad Mirror
- Founders personally accessible via WhatsApp
